list.name: table
list.label: Table
list.query: SELECT t.name FROM system.tables t INNER JOIN system.columns c ON t.database = c.database AND t.name = c.table WHERE t.database = 'default' AND c.name = 'nodeid' GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY t.name

list.name: feature
list.label: Allure feature
list.description: Filter to tests carrying @allure.feature("X"). Pick 'all' to include tests with no allure feature label — picking a specific feature excludes them.
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS feature UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(allure_labels['feature']) AS feature FROM default.${table}

list.name: story
list.label: Allure story
list.description: Filter to tests carrying @allure.story("X"). Options auto-narrow to stories that exist within the currently-selected feature. Picking a specific story also excludes tests with no allure story label.
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS story UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(allure_labels['story']) AS story FROM default.${table} WHERE (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote}))

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS outcomes FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote}))

SELECT countDistinct(run_id) AS runs FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote}))

SELECT countIf(status = 'passed') AS passed, countIf(status = 'failed') AS failed, countIf(status = 'broken') AS broken, countIf(status = 'skipped') AS skipped FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote}))

panels.title: Pass rate %
panels.description: Mean of per-bucket pass rates over the selected time range. Formula: (passed + skipped) / (passed + failed + broken + skipped) * 100 — skipped tests are counted as 'not failed' alongside passed (they didn't run, so they didn't fail). Failed and broken drag the rate down. Sparkline shows how the rate moved across buckets.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(status IN ('passed', 'skipped')) / count() * 100 AS pass_rate FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote})) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT arrayElement(splitByString('::', nodeid), -1) AS test, nodeid, count() AS runs, quantileExact(0.5)(duration) AS p50_seconds, quantileExact(0.95)(duration) AS p95_seconds FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND status = 'passed' AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote})) GROUP BY nodeid, test ORDER BY p50_seconds DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Flakiest tests (intra-run flake rate)
panels.description: A test is 'flaky in a run' when that run contains at least one 'passed' attempt AND at least one 'failed' or 'broken' attempt — broken (setup/teardown error) is counted as a failure-style outcome alongside failed. flake_rate_pct = flaky_runs / runs over the time range.

targets.rawSql: WITH per_run AS (SELECT nodeid, run_id, countIf(status IN ('failed','broken')) > 0 AND countIf(status='passed') > 0 AS flaked FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote})) GROUP BY nodeid, run_id) SELECT arrayElement(splitByString('::', nodeid), -1) AS test, nodeid, count() AS runs, countIf(flaked) AS flaky_runs, countIf(flaked) / count() * 100 AS flake_rate_pct FROM per_run GROUP BY nodeid, test HAVING flaky_runs > 0 ORDER BY flaky_runs DESC, flake_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT any(timestamp) AS time, if(ci_provider = 'local' OR ci_run_id = '', 'local', concat(ci_provider, ' #', ci_run_id)) AS pipeline, if(git_branch = '', '—', git_branch) AS branch, substring(git_commit, 1, 8) AS commit, count() AS total, countIf(status = 'passed') AS passed, countIf(status = 'failed') AS failed, countIf(status = 'broken') AS broken, countIf(status = 'skipped') AS skipped, countIf(status IN ('passed', 'skipped')) / count() * 100 AS pass_rate_pct FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote})) GROUP BY run_id, ci_provider, ci_run_id, git_branch, git_commit ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Tests per pipeline run (stacked by status)

targets.rawSql: SELECT min(timestamp) AS time, countIf(status = 'passed') AS passed, countIf(status = 'failed') AS failed, countIf(status = 'broken') AS broken, countIf(status = 'skipped') AS skipped FROM default.${table} WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (${feature:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['feature'], ${feature:singlequote})) AND (${story:singlequote} = 'all' OR has(allure_labels['story'], ${story:singlequote})) GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY time
